[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10001011 4
1 01100000 2
2 00101001 3
3 11010011 5
4 00110111 5
5 01111001 5
6 10110111 6
7 10001011 4

01 10 01111101 6
12 21 01001110 4
23 32 11001110 5
34 43 00111100 4
45 54 11101011 6
56 65 01001001 3
67 76 10110000 3
70 07 11010011 5 match 3

02 20 00110011 4
13 31 10000000 1
24 42 11110010 5
35 53 11010111 6
46 64 10100010 3
57 75 11111001 6
60 06 01100011 4
71 17 10101110 5

36 63 10011110 5

50 05 00101010 3
61 16 00011110 4
72 27 11100000 3
